visual_intent: mist-blue calm with editorial breathing room
soft human context without product emphasis
brand_guardrails: use Set 4 as the visual lead and keep it lighter than the March 25 reel
preserve top and bottom safe zones
keep typography stable across all 3 frames
avoid turning the story into a feed-style explanation card
do not use fake buttons or sticker-heavy UI
keep text color density, opacity, and typographic presence visually consistent across all 3 frames
composition: one short message block per frame
subtle lifestyle image support behind or around the text
clear safe space for optional native sticker use on frame 3
mist-blue and cloud-white atmosphere with restrained steel-blue structure
reference_strategy: Use the approved Set 4 lifestyle reference for realism and routine context, then use editorial-whitespace and cool-palette anchors to keep the story readable, calm, and premium.
variation_guardrails: keep the story more text-led than the lifestyle reference
avoid making the background too scenic or too photographic
make the atmosphere feel like a lived-in workday, not a campaign image
avoid exact crop or pose matching from the reference

batch_lock.text_color: dark charcoal, visually consistent across all frames
batch_lock.weight_presence: same medium-weight feel across all frames

slides_ja: 整える余白が先に消える。
だからこそ、押し切るより土台を守りたい。
こんな日、ありますか？ 自分のペースを見直すきっかけに。

notes: March 25 daily-context story. Keep this more human and image-led than the March 23/24 Set 1 stories while preserving the same typographic discipline and premium calm.
